config.name: colliding_rings_nu0001
config.description: Two counter-propagating vortex rings (strength=4, R=1.2, sigma=0.25, d=1.2) colliding on z-axis + TG k=2 seed (eps=0.15). Ring collision → vortex reconnection → extreme vorticity. Fundamentally different from TG: concentrated azimuthal-to-axial vorticity conversion. Nu=0.0001 for Re~40000 (strength/nu).
